factors.summary: Management has included forward-looking statements that indicate potential risks and uncertainties affecting future results.

evidence.text: Forward-looking statements in Part I, Item 2 may involve risks and uncertainties that could cause results to differ materially from those projected (refer to the section entitled “Cautionary Note Concerning Factors That May Affect Future Results” in Part I, Item 2 and the risk factors provided in Part II, Item 1A for discussion of these risks and uncertainties).
evidence.subsection: Item 2. Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations.

sentiment.label: negative
sentiment.rationale: The factor indicates potential risks and uncertainties affecting future results, which suggests a cautious outlook.
